kpis.label: Business Continuity Readiness
kpis.description: Weighted readiness across plans, tests, and documentation.

kpis.label: Critical Business Processes
kpis.description: Processes classified Critical or High in the live BIA.

kpis.label: Recovery Compliance
kpis.description: RTO / RPO adherence against last validated exercises.

kpis.label: Business Continuity Health Score
kpis.description: Composite of readiness, overdue plans, and critical gaps.

aiRecommendations: Validate recovery dependencies before next exercise.

comments.author: Nasser
comments.body: Recovery posture reviewed with BCM Office.

processes.name: Enterprise Data Lake

recommendations.title: Finance department has 3 overdue recovery plans
recommendations.detail: RDS Finance, Treasury Settlement, and SWIFT Gateway exceed the retest policy window. Prioritize Finance remediation this sprint.

recommendations.title: Recovery compliance dropped by 4%
recommendations.detail: Month-over-month decline is driven by partial Oracle ERP recovery and overdue critical retests.

recommendations.title: 2 critical processes exceed target RTO
recommendations.detail: Treasury Settlement and Oracle Analytics targets are outside peer criticality bands for enterprise banking.

recommendations.title: Recommend scheduling a tabletop exercise
recommendations.detail: Include Identity Services MFA failover and ISP outage communication gaps from the last Cisco exercise.

recommendations.title: Recommend reviewing payment recovery plan
recommendations.detail: Payment Gateway and Payment Processing share concentrated vendor dependencies entering Peak Payday.

recommendations.title: Recommend updating dependencies
recommendations.detail: Several At Risk / Review processes still reference stale alternate services after the Q2 infrastructure changes.
